properties.body:
[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 018/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC
APPROACHES TO PORT KLAIPEDA – ENTRANCE – MAINTENANCE DREDGING
MAINTENANCE DREDGING IN PROGRESS IN THE SEAWAY CHANNEL, WITHIN AREA BOUNDED BY:
55-43.8N 021-04.9E
55-43.7N 021-05.2E
55-43.7N 021-05.2E
55-43.6N 021-05.5E
55-43.5N 021-04.4E
55-43.7N 021-04.7E
55-43.8N 021-04.8E.
VESSELS ARE ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION NEAR THE DREDGING WORKS AREA. VESSELS MUST PASS AT MINIMUM SAFE SPEED WHEN WORKS ARE IN PROGRESS.
ALL VESSELS MUST KEEP DISTANCE OF AT LEAST 30 METERS FROM THE DREDGING VESSELS AND MUST NOT OBSTRUCT THEIR MANEUVERING.
FOR FURTHER INFORMATION, CONTACT VTD.
CANCEL LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 097(T)/25.
